theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for a 'Fiscal Document' aesthetic.
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A serious tax compliance product used by Chartered Accountants needs authoritative precision, dense data legibility, and an accountant-friendly tabular look. We blend Swiss structural clarity with warm, ledger-like off-whites.

monospace.usage: All table data cells containing numbers, voucher numbers, and dates.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - dense, structural, no wasted space. Use 1px crisp borders (Grid Borders pattern) and eliminate soft drop shadows.

app_shell.structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[260px_1fr] h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#F9F9F8]

layout_and_spacing.tables: Dense padding (py-2.5 px-3). Text left-aligned. Numbers right-aligned. Sticky headers.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use rounded-sm or rounded-none to emphasize the technical/fiscal nature of the tool.

components_customization.Button: bg-[#0F172A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E293B] rounded-sm shadow-none font-medium
components_customization.Table: border-collapse w-full text-sm. Header bg-[#F3F4F1] border-y border-[#E5E5E0]. Rows border-b border-[#E5E5E0].
components_customization.Badge: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 border border-slate-200 rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs (Use for mapping chips)
components_customization.Input/Select: border-[#E5E5E0] focus:border-[#0F172A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0F172A] rounded-sm shadow-none
components_customization.Sheet: Right-side slide-out (w-[600px] or w-[800px]) for detailed transaction audit trail.

landing_login.layout: Split screen or centered clean card. Left/Background: Elegant, monochromatic paper-like tone or the professional portrait. Right/Center: Clean login box.
landing_login.content: Assure Ecosystem Wordmark. Minimal Google Login Button.

sidebar_history.functionality: List of past runs. Elements show date, filename, and an 'Archive' hover action.

step_1_upload.layout: Two stacked dashed-border dropzones (JSON and XLSX).
step_1_upload.styling: bg-[#F9F9F8] border-2 border-dashed border-[#E5E5E0] p-10 text-center hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors.

step_2_mapping.itc_ledger: Searchable multi-select (Command pattern). Pre-select/suggest ledgers matching 'GST', 'IGST', 'CGST', 'SGST'. Display selected as removable Badges.
step_2_mapping.expenditure_exclusion: Similar to above, but excluding P&L ledgers like 'Depreciation', 'Salaries', 'Interest', 'PF', 'ESI'.

step_3_report.interaction: Every numeric cell in Col 2-7 is clickable (cursor-pointer, hover:underline or slight bg change). Opens Drill-down Sheet.

drilldown_sheet.content: Transaction list: Date, Voucher No, Ledger Name, Party Name, Amount, Reason. High density table inside the sheet.

specific_rules.number_formatting: Must use Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }). Do NOT display the Rupee symbol (₹). Example: 1,50,000.00
specific_rules.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, table cells, and form inputs MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-json-input', data-testid='cell-col3-row1').
specific_rules.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a sharp, technical look.
specific_rules.javascript_only: All guidelines apply to .js / .jsx files. Do not use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).

images.instructions: Use as a high-quality, professional background or side-panel image on the login/landing page to establish trust. Apply a grayscale or heavy navy/slate duotone overlay (e.g., mix-blend-multiply with bg-slate-900) to keep it from looking like a cheap stock photo and integrate perfectly with the Swiss UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), IBM Plex Mono (numbers/tables).
Initialize Tailwind and Shadcn in a .js/.jsx React environment.
Implement the Layout shell with a sidebar and main content area.
Build the 3-step workflow (Upload -> Mapping -> Clause 44 Report) in the main area.
Override default Shadcn styles to remove border-radius (use rounded-sm at most) and drop-shadows, matching the 'Control Room / Fiscal Document' aesthetic.
Ensure the final Clause 44 table heavily uses the monospace font for numbers and strictly formats to the Indian numbering system.
Build the drill-down Sheet for transaction-level audit trails when a table cell is clicked.
Mock the authentication and Excel generation if backend integration is out of scope, but UI states must exist.
